# Dollr Developer Documentation

> Dollr is a payment infrastructure platform for businesses operating in Africa. It provides a single REST API to collect mobile money and card payments, send payouts, process transfers, and issue refunds — abstracting MTN, Orange, Airtel, and international card networks into one consistent interface. API base URL: `https://api.heydollr.app`. Current version: `v1`. All requests and responses use JSON.

## Authentication

Dollr uses OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials. POST your `client_id` and `client_secret` to `/v1/jwt/client/obtain/token` to receive a short-lived JWT. Pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on every subsequent request. Tokens expire after `expires_in` minutes — refresh proactively. Credentials are generated in the Merchant Dashboard at https://merchant.heydollr.app.

## Supported Payment Methods

| Method | Enum identifier | Market |
|---|---|---|
| MTN Mobile Money | `MTN_MOMO_LBR` | Liberia |
| Orange Money | `ORANGE_MONEY_LBR` | Liberia |
| Airtel Money | `AIRTEL_RWA` | Rwanda |
| MTN Mobile Money | `MTN_MOMO_RWA` | Rwanda |
| Orange Money | `ORANGE_MONEY_RWA` | Rwanda |
| Credit / Debit Card | `CREDIT_CARD` | International |
| Dollr Wallet | `WALLET` | Internal transfers |

`provider` = routing gateway (`PAWAPAY`, `STRIPE`, `PLATFORM`). `method` = payment instrument (`MTN_MOMO_LBR`, `CREDIT_CARD`, etc.). These are distinct fields — do not conflate them.

## Core Concepts

**Party** — A contact record: name, phone, optional email, country code. Created before invoices in the document-first flow.

**Counterparty** — Links a Party to your merchant account with a relationship type: `CUSTOMER`, `SUPPLIER`, `EMPLOYEE`, `BENEFICIARY`, or `OTHER`.

**Invoice** — Formal billing document with auto-generated number, due date, and line items. Publish before collecting. Can be shared as a payment link.

**Order** — Like an invoice but without a formal number or due date. Suited for e-commerce.

**Session** — Declares the intent to perform an operation: `CHECKOUT`, `PAYOUT`, `TRANSFER`, or `REFUND`. Sessions expire if not executed within the time window.

**Execution** — Submits an active Session for processing. Requires `session_id`, `payment_account_id`, `currency`, and a unique `reference_id` (UUID v4). The `reference_id` is the idempotency key — generate it before the network call, store it, reuse it on retry. Never generate a new one without first checking status.

**Payment Account** — A registered wallet or card account for a Party. Created with `POST /v1/payment-accounts/create?operation_type=COLLECTION` (or `PAYOUT`).

**Fee Bearer** — `PAYER`: customer pays fees on top of the total; merchant receives full amount. `PAYEE`: merchant absorbs fees; customer pays the invoice total.

## Standard Collection Flow (Invoice)

1. `POST /v1/jwt/client/obtain/token` — authenticate
2. `POST /v1/parties/create` — create Party, store `party.id`
3. `POST /v1/counterparties/create` — link Party to merchant, store `counterparty.id`
4. `POST /v1/invoices/create` — create Invoice, store `invoice.id`
5. `POST /v1/invoices/{id}/items/add` — add line items
6. `PUT /v1/invoices/publish/{id}` — publish Invoice (status → `ACTIVE`)
7. `GET /v1/predictions/mmo-provider-info?phone={phone}&operation_type=COLLECTION` — detect wallet provider (recommended)
8. `POST /v1/payment-accounts/create?operation_type=COLLECTION` — register customer wallet
9. `POST /v1/sessions/checkout` — create checkout Session with `source_id` + `source_type`
10. `POST /v1/executions/collection` — execute (store `reference_id` BEFORE this call)
11. `GET /v1/status/collection/{reference_id}` — poll until `COMPLETED` or `FAILED`

## Direct Checkout Flow (no prior invoice)

`POST /v1/checkouts/create` — creates a checkout source directly from payer details. Dollr auto-creates or matches the Party and Counterparty. Skips steps 2–6 above.

## Transaction Status Values

- Execution: `PENDING` → `PROCESSING` → `COMPLETED` | `FAILED`
- Invoice/Order source: `IDLE` → `ACTIVE` → `PROCESSING` → `PAID` | `CANCELED`
- Mobile money payments may stay in `PROCESSING` for several minutes while the carrier confirms. Do not retry during this window — query status instead.

## HTTP Status Codes

| Code | Meaning | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `200` | Success | Process response |
| `401` | Invalid or expired token | Refresh token and retry |
| `403` | Insufficient permissions | Check account verification status |
| `404` | Resource not found | Verify the resource ID |
| `422` | Validation error | Inspect `detail` array for field-level messages |
| `429` | Rate limited | Back off; honor `Retry-After` header |
| `5xx` | Server error | Retry with exponential backoff |

## Getting Started

- [Overview & Introduction](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/index): Platform overview, authentication, API conventions, and core concepts
- [Quick Start](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/quickstart): Complete working example from zero to a successful payment collection in under 10 minutes

## API Reference

- [Parties](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/parties): Create and manage contact records (name, phone, email, country)
- [Counterparties](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/counterparties): Link a Party to your merchant account with a relationship type
- [Invoices](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/invoices): Create, manage, add items to, publish, and retrieve receipts for invoices
- [Orders](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/orders): Create and manage payment orders for retail and e-commerce
- [Checkouts](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/checkouts): Create checkout sources directly from payer details without a prior invoice
- [Sessions](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/sessions): Declare payment intent for collections, payouts, transfers, and refunds
- [Executions](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/executions): Submit an active Session to move funds; all execution types covered
- [Transaction Status](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/status): Query execution status by `reference_id` for any operation type
- [Payment Accounts](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/payment-accounts): Register and retrieve mobile wallets and card accounts for a Party
- [Payment Links](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/links): Generate and manage shareable payment links tied to invoices or orders
- [Predictions](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/predictions): Preview fees and FX rates before executing; detect mobile money provider from phone number
- [Fees](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/fees): Retrieve gateway and platform fee schedules for your merchant account
- [Merchants](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/merchants): Retrieve and update your merchant profile
- [Realtime Keys](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/api/realtime-keys): Generate short-lived keys for subscribing to live transaction events (no polling)

## Guides

- [Integration Guide](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/guides/integration): Full end-to-end walkthroughs for collection, payout, transfer, and refund flows with code examples
- [Error Handling](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/guides/error-handling): Retry logic with exponential backoff, idempotency rules, and status code reference

## Optional

- [Glossary](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/reference/glossary): Definitions for every term and enum value used in the API
- [SDKs](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/reference/sdks): Official Dollr SDKs (in development) and community-built libraries
- [Support](https://docs.heydollr.app/docs/reference/support): Help center, in-app bug/feature reporting, and developer contact
- [OpenAPI Specification](https://api.heydollr.app/openapi.json): Machine-readable full API spec for code generation, Postman import, and tooling
